Title: Successful User Registration - Valid Data
Inputs (Test Data):
first_name: John
last_name: Smith
email: john.smith123@gmail.com
password: SecurePass123!
phone: 1234567890
dob: 1990-05-15
address: 123 Main St
city: New York
state: NY
country: United States
postcode: 10001
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Enter first_name: John
3. Enter last_name: Smith
4. Enter email: john.smith123@gmail.com
5. Enter password: SecurePass123!
6. Enter phone: 1234567890
7. Enter dob: 1990-05-15
8. Enter address: 123 Main St
9. Enter city: New York
10. Enter state: NY
11. Enter country: United States
12. Enter postcode: 10001
13. Click Register button
Expected Result:
1. User account is created successfully
2. Success message displayed
3. Redirected to login page
4. No validation errors
5. User data stored in database
